🔧 Bug Triage Sweep — 6 Open Bugs Verified at HEAD

Each bug re-verified by a parallel Explore agent against current code (memory is dated). 3 prior triages were wrong — flagged in red.

🔧 4 fixed this PR 📜 2 design docs 🔵 1 closed (not-a-regression) ❌ 3 prior triages corrected
Verification method: 6 parallel Explore agents, one per bug, skeptical of prior triage. Design docs → docs/audits/design-2475-*.md, design-2528-*.md.
